title: Switch
description: A component that provides a toggle switch control, allowing users to enable or disable a setting with a sliding animation.

sections.title: Color Variants
sections.description: Example of switch with different color variants

sections.title: On/Off States
sections.description: Example of switch with on/off state indicators

sections.title: Custom Content
sections.description: Example of switch with custom content in different states

sections.title: On/Off with Content
sections.description: Example of switch with both on/off indicators and custom content

sections.title: Loading State
sections.description: Example of switch in loading state

sections.title: Size Variants
sections.description: Example of switch with different size options using utility classes

sections.title: Disabled and Readonly States
sections.description: Example of switch in different interaction states

props.name: value
props.description: The current value of the switch (checked state)

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the switch is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: If set to true, user cannot change the value of component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: color
props.description: Predefined color schemes. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tabindex of the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: Name attribute for the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Indicates whether the component is in a loading state.

props.name: dirty
props.description: Indicates whether the component value has been modified. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: Current validation state of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: isRequired
props.description: Indicates whether the component has required validation. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Emitted when the value changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Fires each time the user changes the value. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when the readonly state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: colorChange
events.description: Emitted when the color changes. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Fires each time the component gets focused. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Fires each time the component gets blurred. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when the validation state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: validationRulesChange
events.description: Emitted when validation rules change. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Commits a value with optional user interaction flag.
 *
 * @param value - The value to commit.
 * @param u - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
commitValue(value: boolean, u = false): void

/**
 * Resets the component value.
 *
 * @param e - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
reset(e = false): void

/**
 * Validates the component.
 *
 * @returns Promise<AXValidationSummary> - Validation result.
 */
async validate(): Promise<AXValidationSummary>

/**
 * Adds a validation rule.
 *
 * @param rule - The validation rule to add.
 */
addValidationRule(rule: AXFormValidationRule): void

/**
 * Removes a validation rule.
 *
 * @param ruleToRemove - The validation rule to remove.
 */
removeValidationRule(ruleToRemove: AXFormValidationRule): void

/**
 * Marks the component as dirty.
 */
markAsDirty(): void
